ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike ride */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the ride started */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ride started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ride ended */,
  "duration_minutes" REAL /* Duration of the ride in minutes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the ride */,
  "ride_date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date of the ride */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season during which the ride occurred */,
  "route_taken" TEXT /* Route taken during the ride */,
  "ride_type" INTEGER /* Type of ride (e.g., one-way, round-trip, or rental) */,
  "payment_method" INTEGER /* Payment method used for the ride */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the ride */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week of the ride */,
  "working_day" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the day is a working day */,
  "weather_situation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather situation during the ride */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "feeling_temperature" REAL /* Feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Windspeed in km/h */,
  "ride_count" INTEGER /* Count of total bike rides on that day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rides_weather_situation_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_situation_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rides_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rides_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rides_ride_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rides_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rides_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the station */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geolocation coordinates of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes it can hold) */,
  "station_type" INTEGER /* Type of station (e.g., bike-only, scooter-only, or mixed) */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Nearby points of interest or landmarks */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, in-use, under-maintenance) */,
  "bike_status_history" TEXT /* Historical status of the bike */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "bike_condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the bike (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "membership_type" INTEGER /* Type of user (e.g., member, visitor, staff) */,
  "user_type_details" TEXT /* Additional information about the user type */,
  "membership_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the user's membership */,
  "favorite_stations" TEXT /* Favorite stations of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_situation" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1: clear, 2: mist, 3: light snow, 4: heavy rain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "weather_icon" TEXT /* Icon or ID of the weather icon associated with the condition */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W, or degrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" INTEGER /* Season (1: spring, 2: summer, 3: fall, 4: winter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Starting date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* Ending date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday or special event */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday or special event */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday or special event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday or special event */,
  "holiday_type" INTEGER /* Type of holiday (e.g., national, regional, or cultural) */,
  "holiday_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_rides" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the aggregated data */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides on that day */,
  "average_duration_minutes" REAL /* Average duration of rides on that day in minutes */,
  "total_distance_km" REAL /* Total distance covered by all rides on that day in kilometers */,
  "most_popular_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most popular station on that day */,
  "weather_situation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather situation on that day */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season on that day */,
  "average_speed_kmh" REAL /* Average speed of rides on that day in km/h */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated on that day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_rides_most_popular_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("most_popular_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_rides_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_rides_weather_situation_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_situation_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_coordinates" TEXT /* Geolocation coordinates of the route */,
  "route_distance_km" REAL /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date_value" TEXT /* Actual date */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday, etc.) */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the date is a weekend */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the date is a holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine check, repair) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_category" INTEGER /* Category of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair, or overhaul) */,
  "maintenance_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride associated with the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_category" INTEGER /* Category of feedback (e.g., bike condition, station quality, or customer support) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES bike_rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin log */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of administrative activity (e.g., data entry, system maintenance) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the administrative activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_category" INTEGER /* Category of administrative activity (e.g., data entry, system maintenance, or user management) */,
  "activity_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the administrative activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "payment_method" INTEGER /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)
